results.title: 1814: Live Project Celebrates Connection & Collaboration In New Visual Album Release
results.description: At its heart, 1814: Live Project is a celebration of collaboration. Bringing together artists from across Aotearoa, the project reflects the profound influence 1814 has had on generations of musicians and audiences alike.

results.title: Inside France: Versailles Treaty II, heatwaves and pop-up art
results.description: From the power of the canicule and the country's best music festival, via the troubled history of Versailles treaties, Inside France is our weekly look at the latest news and talking points in France.

results.title: Chris Tucker hasn't had sex for three years
results.description: The Rush Hour star explained that he has been celibate for the past three years because he is waiting to get married again during a comedy gig in Las Vegas last week.
